products.name: Black Apron with White Logo
products.description: This apron has a neck loop and long ties that are easy to adjust for any size. The two front pockets provide additional space for some much-needed cooking utensils, and together with our embroidered logo give the apron a sleek premium look.

products.name: Baby's Gray Bib with Black Logo
products.description: Avoid getting food stains on child’s clothes with this baby bib. The reinforced hook & loop closure makes it easy to put on, but hard for baby to take off. 4x4" embroidered logo.
